model: Chanel Gold Metal Paris Shangai CC Cylinders Necklace or Belt
full_description: Classic vintage Chanel necklace or belt from the 'Paris-Shangai' collection . It is very versatile and will complete every look (you can use it as a necklace or as a belt). It features golden metal chain necklace with beaded chain, interspersed with black and white enamelled Asian-inspired cylinders and gold metal elements embellished with rhinestones and CC logos. Lobster closure. Total length: 36 inches - 91.4 cm . 'CHANEL 09 CC CMade in France' oval hallmark near the hook Condition A - EXCELLENT Gently used. inimal darkness on metal. Chanel box included. Please check the photos carefully and ask if you need to know more details or if you have any doubts.
